description: Hotel, travel, tourism, food service, events and guest-experience careers.

careers.name: Hotel Manager
careers.overview: Hotel Manager manages guest experience, travel, hotels, food service, events, tourism operations and service businesses.
careers.whyChoose: Hotel Manager is useful because it offers people-facing work, global mobility and practical career growth in a large service industry.
careers.eligibility: Class 12 in any stream; hotel management or tourism entrance exams may be required.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 -> Hotel/tourism degree or diploma -> Industrial training -> Hospitality, travel or event role.
careers.workEnvironment: Hotels, resorts, restaurants, airlines, travel companies, event firms, cruise lines and tourism departments.
careers.futureScope: Strong due to tourism, food service, events, luxury experiences and global travel recovery.
careers.aiImpact: AI will support booking and service systems while hospitality, empathy and operations remain human-led.
cons: Early career may need portfolio or training
